/bin/zsh -lc "./.venv/bin/python - <<'PY'
from sympy import FiniteSet, ProductSet, Eq, symbols, Tuple

a = FiniteSet(1, 2)
b = ProductSet(a, a)
c = FiniteSet((1, 1), (1, 2), (2, 1), (2, 2))
for expr in [b, c, b.intersection(c), c.intersection(b), b.is_subset(c), c.is_subset(b), Eq(b,c), Eq(b,c).simplify(), b.rewrite(FiniteSet)]:
    print(repr(expr))
print(type(c.args[0]), c.args)
print([b._contains(e) for e in c])
print([c._contains(e) for e in b])
PY

/bin/zsh -lc "./.venv/bin/python - <<'PY'
from sympy import *
p=ProductSet({1},{2}); i=Interval(1,2)
for a,b in [(p,i),(i,p)]:
 print(type(a).__name__, type(b).__name__, Eq(a,b), a==b, a.is_subset(b), b.is_subset(a))
 print('evalEq a', getattr(a,'_eval_Eq',lambda x:'missing')(b))
 print('evalEq b', getattr(b,'_eval_Eq',lambda x:'missing')(a))
 print('finite', a.is_finite_set,b.is_finite_set,'iter',a.is_iterable,b.is_iterable)
print('product:',p,repr(p))
PY
./.venv/bin/python -m pytest -q sympy/sets/tests/test_sets.py -k 'Eq or 19378'"

/bin/zsh -lc "./.venv/bin/python - <<'PY'
from sympy import FiniteSet, ProductSet, Eq

a = FiniteSet(1, 2)
b = ProductSet(a, a)
c = FiniteSet((1, 1), (1, 2), (2, 1), (2, 2))
for name, thunk in [
 ('b', lambda: b), ('c', lambda:c), ('b&c', lambda:b.intersection(c)), ('c&b', lambda:c.intersection(b)),
 ('b subset c', lambda:b.is_subset(c)), ('c subset b', lambda:c.is_subset(b)), ('Eq', lambda:Eq(b,c)),
 ('Eq simp', lambda:Eq(b,c).simplify()), ('rewrite', lambda:b.rewrite(FiniteSet))]:
 try: print(name, '=', repr(thunk()))
 except Exception as e: print(name, 'RAISED', type(e).__name__, str(e))
print('c element type/args:', type(c.args[0]), c.args)
print('b contains c el:', [b._contains(e) for e in c])
print('c contains b el:', [c._contains(e) for e in b])
print('b iterable:', list(b))
PY

/bin/zsh -lc "sed -n '1800,1975p' sympy/sets/sets.py; sed -n '280,330p' sympy/core/relational.py; sed -n '620,675p' sympy/core/relational.py; rg -n \"_eval_rewrite_as_FiniteSet|is_finite_set|_eval_is_subset|_eval_is_superset\" sympy/sets/sets.py | head -n 100; ./.venv/bin/python - <<'PY'
from sympy import FiniteSet, ProductSet, Eq, symbols, S
x = symbols('x')
a=FiniteSet(1,2); b=ProductSet(a,a); c=FiniteSet((1,1),(1,2),(2,1),(2,2)); d=FiniteSet(1)
for label, expr in [
('b.is_finite_set', lambda:b.is_finite_set),
('len b', lambda:len(b)),
('b subset c',lambda:b.is_subset(c)),('c subset b',lambda:c.is_subset(b)),
('b intersect c',lambda:b.intersect(c)),('c intersect b',lambda:c.intersect(b)),
('Eq(c,b)',lambda:Eq(c,b)),('Eq(c,b).simplify',lambda:Eq(c,b).simplify()),
('b subset d',lambda:b.is_subset(d)),('Eq(a,c).simplify',lambda:Eq(a,c).simplify()),
('Eq({1},{x}).simplify',lambda:Eq({1},{x}).simplify()),
('b rewrite FiniteSet', lambda:b.rewrite(FiniteSet))]:
    try: print(label, '=>', expr())
    except Exception as e: print(label, '"'!!'"', type(e).__name__, e)
PY"
